summary: Frontend-only validation completed on public preview for auth showcase redesign. Auth form remained the primary focus, the lower section rendered as desktop-oriented preview cards, layout was stable, and signup/login flows passed.
action_items: No blocking regressions found in requested auth + showcase scope.
Optional QA hardening: avoid overlapping data-testid prefixes under auth showcase cards to reduce selector ambiguity in long-term e2e tests.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthShowcaseWall map callback includes an unused index argument; remove to keep lint/code quality clean.
Card and child testid naming shares broad prefixes (auth-showcase-card-* vs nested auth-showcase-*) which can produce accidental broad matches in automation.
seed_data_creation: Created UI signup user for validation: qa_auth_wall_7_1772720217@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested URL: https://quick-site-builder.stage-preview.emergentagent.com/auth. Verified auth page load, form-over-showcase hierarchy, showcase card/image render health (6/6 images loaded), desktop-style wide cards present, signup->dashboard->signout->login flow success, and no runtime .error selector messages.
rca of the issue: No functional defects reproduced in requested scope.
